ns0:entry.ns0:title: MunGell/awesome-for-beginners
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/MunGell/awesome-for-beginners
Language: unknown
A list of awesome beginners-friendly projects.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: OWASP/AISVS
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/OWASP/AISVS
Language: unknown
The AI Security Verification Standard (AISVS) focuses on providing developers, architects, and security professionals with a structured checklist to verify the security of AI-driven applications.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: alchaincyf/zhangxuefeng-skill
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/alchaincyf/zhangxuefeng-skill
Language: unknown
张雪峰.skill — 张雪峰的认知操作系统。高考志愿/考研/职业规划的实战思维框架。由女娲.skill生成。

ns0:entry.ns0:title: byoungd/English-level-up-tips
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/byoungd/English-level-up-tips
Language: unknown
An advanced guide to learn English which might benefit you a lot 🎉 . 人生进阶指南 离谱的人生 离谱的英语学习指南/英语学习教程/英语学习/学英语

ns0:entry.ns0:title: enescingoz/awesome-n8n-templates
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/enescingoz/awesome-n8n-templates
Language: unknown
280+ free n8n automation templates — ready-to-use workflows for Gmail, Telegram, Slack, Discord, WhatsApp, Google Drive, Notion, OpenAI, and more. AI agents, RAG chatbots, email automation, social media, DevOps, and document processing. The largest open-source n8n template collection.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: hardikpandya/stop-slop
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/hardikpandya/stop-slop
Language: unknown
A skill file for removing AI tells from prose

ns0:entry.ns0:title: kepano/obsidian-skills
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/kepano/obsidian-skills
Language: unknown
Agent skills for Obsidian. Teach your agent to use Obsidian CLI and open formats including Markdown, Bases, JSON Canvas.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: microsoft/winget-pkgs
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/microsoft/winget-pkgs
Language: unknown
The Microsoft community Windows Package Manager manifest repository

ns0:entry.ns0:title: zhuima/awesome-cloudflare
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/zhuima/awesome-cloudflare
Language: unknown
⛅️ 精选的 Cloudflare 工具、开源项目、指南、博客和其他资源列表。/ ⛅️ A curated list of Cloudflare tools, open source projects, guides, blogs and other resources.
